title: Aesthetic Ladders
description: Want more stylish ways to climb? Aesthetic Ladders adds a variety of beautifully designed ladders that blend seamlessly into your builds and match a wide range of building styles.
body:
**Aesthetic Ladders** is a Minecraft mod that reimagines how ladders fit into your builds by offering a full set of wood-specific ladder variants. Gone are the days of a single wooden ladder that clashes with your beautiful base—this mod introduces custom ladder textures and models for every vanilla wood type, as well as full support for modded woods from Arboreal Nature and Wild Fields.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/947c16ff9109a53720b07a31d98a8ab34ec3e99a.png)

If you wanna more ladders variants, you can check out my mods that add wonderful new trees and other interesting stuff.

[![Arboreal Nature link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb219391aa8cf79057f2c736395e069ed3382279.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arboreal-nature)
[![Wild Fields link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07d027cb7938c202918e14bf6828d23475920db1.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wild-fields)

From oak to mangrove, hornbeam to juniper, each ladder is carefully designed to match its parent wood both visually and thematically, giving you cohesive and immersive building options for any biome, base, or fantasy world.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/796229a3b072859011531156346bf8672fff21a4_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5156bd1c827f494a8c97a7b449ec6acaf9d9c98.png)

## Currently Included:

- All vanilla wood types (Oak, Spruce, Birch, Jungle, Acacia, Dark Oak, Mangrove, Cherry, Bamboo, Crimson, Warped);
- All custom woods from Arboreal Nature and Wild Fields (e.g. Fir, Juniper, Hazelnut, Tamarisk, Cedar, and more!);
- All main vanilla stones and custom variants from Wild Fields for Stone Ladders. 

## Features:

- Custom ladder models and textures tailored to each wood type
- Vanilla-style crafting recipes, easy to integrate into survival gameplay
- Fully compatible with creative inventory sorting and modded build tools
- Designed for visual consistency and build immersion in any environment
- Lightweight and performance-friendly, ideal for both builders and modpacks

## Coming in Future Updates:

- Additional ladder types for non-wood materials (stone, metal, nether, end, etc.)
- Support for wood types from other popular mods
- Themed ladders for industrial, natural, fantasy, or modern aesthetics
- Possible decorative climbing blocks and ladder-based trapdoor alternatives

Whether you're building a rustic outpost, a treetop sanctuary, or an elven tower deep in the forest, Aesthetic Ladders ensures that your vertical movement looks just as good as the rest of your build.

**Climb with consistency. Build with beauty.**
